judge_reason: Description B quotes specific verbatim text ('Film of Flying Saucer Up in Air', 'Allan R. Wilhelm') inside a newspaper clipping that Description A does not mention at all, indicating a significant factual inconsistency on visual content.
original_image_tags: A page from a government file. A newspaper clipping is affixed to the page. To the right of the clipping, there is typed and handwritten text. At the bottom of the page, there is handwritten file information.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned newspaper clipping with the headline “Grand Blanc Man Makes Plea to Ike” and large subhead “Film of Flying Saucer Up in Air,” plus a narrow article column and red/purple typewritten archive markings on the right including “DETROIT DIVISION, Detroit, Mich.” and handwritten editor/date notes.*
